title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a split AI brain for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for homes, security, and industrial work. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T reference platform with Jetson Thor chips, offering two thousand teraflops of onboard compute for robotics research.
